descriptions.liquidity_vacuum: Thin hours and/or wide spread — microstructure hostile
descriptions.impulse: Strong impulse / acceleration — breakout-like path risk
descriptions.expansion: ATR expanding with elevated ADX — steamroller climate
descriptions.exhaustion: High ADX but decelerating after long same-dir run
descriptions.false_breakout: Far from EMA with weak/falling ADX — extension without trend fuel
descriptions.compression: ATR contracting, quiet ADX — coiled / low energy
descriptions.grind: Modest slope, mid ADX, shallow pullback — slow trend grind
descriptions.pullback_trend: FEMA home: mid ADX, pullback-to-EMA geometry
descriptions.rotation: Low ADX chop / residual — range rotation
